title: MIDWIFE
doc_html:
CHAPTER 46.  MIDWIFE

§3240.  Short title

This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the Midwife Practitioners Act.  

Acts 1984, No. 688, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1985.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 46.  MIDWIFE
§3240.  Short title
This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the Midwife Practitioners Act.
Acts 1984, No. 688, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1985.
